tagline: Your Backyard Oasis - You Dream It, We Make It Happen

hero.headline: Award-Winning Pools Built Just for You
hero.subheadline: For 16 years, New Jersey families have trusted EverClear to design and build their dream pools. From custom gunite construction to weekly maintenance, we handle everything so you can enjoy every splash.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: From Dream Design to<br class="hidden md:block"> Crystal-Clear Water
services.subtitle: Whether you want a brand-new custom pool or need expert care for your existing one, EverClear delivers award-winning craftsmanship and reliable service across every project.

cards.title: Custom Gunite Pools
cards.description: Your dream pool, built to last. Custom-designed gunite pools with unlimited shape possibilities, premium finishes, and unmatched durability for your family's backyard oasis.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling & Renovation
cards.description: Breathe new life into your outdated pool. From modern resurfacing and new tile to complete layout redesigns, we transform tired pools into stunning centerpieces.

cards.title: Spa & Hot Tub Installation
cards.description: Standalone spas or integrated pool-spa combos designed for year-round relaxation. Expert installation with custom features to create your personal retreat.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Crystal-clear water every week, guaranteed. Our certified technicians handle chemicals, cleaning, and equipment checks so you never worry about your pool again.

cards.title: Pool Decking & Landscaping
cards.description: Premium pool decks and integrated landscape design that tie your entire outdoor space together. Safe, beautiful surroundings built to complement your pool.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Service
cards.description: Fast, expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems. Most issues resolved same-visit to keep your pool running smoothly.

how_it_works.headline: Your Dream Pool in Three Simple Steps

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Tell us about your dream backyard. We'll visit your property for a free consultation, discuss your ideas, and provide an honest, detailed proposal within 48 hours.

steps.title: We Build or Service It
steps.description: Our NESPA award-winning team brings your vision to life with certified craftsmanship. Every project is managed hands-on by owner Jason Werner for quality you can trust.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Oasis
steps.description: Dive into your finished pool or relax knowing your maintenance is handled. We stand behind every project with ongoing support and our satisfaction guarantee.

about.label: Why NJ Families Choose EverClear
about.headline: 16 Years of Award-Winning Pool Craftsmanship
about.description: Founded by Jason Werner in 2010, EverClear Pools & Spas has grown from a local pool service into one of New Jersey's most decorated pool contractors. With multiple NESPA Outstanding Achievement Awards, a Top 3 ranking in Passaic County, and nearly 500 five-star reviews, we've earned our reputation one backyard at a time. Our bilingual team treats every project like it's our own, because building lasting relationships matters more to us than just building pools.

features.title: Certified & Award-Winning Team
features.description: CPO-certified technicians, OSHA-trained crews, and multiple NESPA awards spanning 2017-2024. Your project is in the best hands in New Jersey.

features.title: Full-Service, Start to Finish
features.description: Design, build, maintain, and repair — all under one roof. We're your single point of contact from the first sketch to your tenth season.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with our work? We'll make it right at no additional cost. With a 4.8-star rating across 493 reviews, our track record speaks for itself.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed, upfront proposal. Financing options available for pool construction — ask us about flexible payment plans.

guarantee.headline: Our "Dream Pool" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service or project milestone, we'll make it right at no extra charge. With 16 years in business, an A+ BBB rating, and nearly 500 five-star reviews, we stake our reputation on every single job. Your satisfaction isn't just a promise — it's how we've built our business.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a custom pool?
faqs.answer: Most custom gunite pools take 8-12 weeks from groundbreaking to your first swim. Vinyl pools are typically faster at 4-6 weeks. We'll give you a detailed timeline during your free consultation and keep you updated at every stage.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for pool construction?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer flexible financing options to make your dream pool affordable. During your consultation, we'll discuss payment plans that fit your budget so you can start enjoying your backyard sooner.

faqs.question: What areas in New Jersey do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Passaic County and surrounding areas including Paterson, Wyckoff, Franklin Lakes, Clifton, Saddle River, Alpine, Hewitt, Mendham, and neighboring communities throughout northern New Jersey.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our team holds CPO and Certified Pool & Spa Service Technician credentials, OSHA safety certifications, and we're members of both NESPA and the Pool & Hot Tub Alliance. We also carry full liability insurance.

faqs.question: Do you handle both pool construction and maintenance?
faqs.answer: Yes — we're a true full-service pool company. From custom design and construction to weekly maintenance, seasonal openings and closings, repairs, and renovations, EverClear handles it all under one roof.

testimonials.name: Terry G.
testimonials.text: Thomas and Justin came today to clean up after the pool's opening. They were fabulous. Started work right away, were pleasant and professional and my pool is absolutely clean. Great work!

testimonials.name: Long-Time Customer
testimonials.text: We have been using Everclear Pools & Spas for 3 years and I can't say enough great things about them. Melynda and Mary in the office and Ricky are always so responsive and helpful.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Homeowner
testimonials.text: Jesus, Eric and Charles did a phenomenal job winterizing and closing our pool. I highly recommend this crew and company to anyone looking for professional pool service.
